user.title: Set up GitHub Copilot
user.description: Connect your GitHub Copilot subscription to Home Assistant.

auth.title: Authorize with GitHub

model.title: Select a model
model.description: Choose the default model for GitHub Copilot.

error.auth_timeout: Authorization timed out. Please try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to GitHub. Check your network.
error.model_no_access: Your GitHub Copilot subscription does not have access to this model. Please choose a different one.

abort.already_configured: This GitHub account is already configured.

data_description.prompt: Instruct how the LLM should respond. This can be a template.
data_description.llm_hass_api: Allow the model to interact with Home Assistant (e.g., control devices, get states).
data_description.max_history: Maximum number of previous conversation turns to include. 0 = unlimited.
